SEARCH
Package com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.util

Class Constants

java.lang.Object
com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.util.Constants
public final class Constants extends Object
Constants.java Shared constants — mainly Firestore collection names so we don't hardcode strings all over the place.
